statement.p: Simplify this expression, and if applicable, write the restricted domain.

solution.p: To simply the complex fraction \frac{{\frac{4}{y-1}-4}}{{\frac{1}{y-1}+\frac{1}{y-10}}}, we multiple the numerator and denominator with the common denominator of {\frac{4}{y-1}-4} and {\frac{1}{y-1}+\frac{1}{y-10}}, which is {\left(y-1\right)\mathopen{}\left(y-10\right)}.
Since y-1 and y-10 were canceled, y \ne 1 and y \ne 10 are in the lost domain condition.
